name: Common Cold
causes: Rhinovirus, coronavirus (non-COVID)
treatment: Rest, fluids, OTC cold medicine, decongestants

name: Influenza (Flu)
causes: Influenza A or B virus
treatment: Antiviral medication (Tamiflu), rest, fluids, fever reducers

name: Pneumonia
causes: Bacteria (Streptococcus), viruses, fungi
treatment: Antibiotics, rest, fluids, hospitalization in severe cases

name: Asthma
causes: Allergens, exercise, cold air, respiratory infections
treatment: Inhalers (bronchodilators), corticosteroids, avoiding triggers

name: Tuberculosis
causes: Mycobacterium tuberculosis bacteria
treatment: Long-term antibiotics (6-9 months), DOTS therapy

name: Bronchitis
causes: Viruses, bacteria, smoking, air pollution
treatment: Rest, fluids, cough medicine, antibiotics if bacterial

name: Type 2 Diabetes
causes: Insulin resistance, obesity, genetics, sedentary lifestyle
treatment: Metformin, lifestyle changes, diet control, insulin therapy

name: Type 1 Diabetes
causes: Autoimmune destruction of insulin-producing cells
treatment: Insulin therapy (lifelong), blood sugar monitoring, diet management

name: Hypothyroidism
causes: Hashimoto's thyroiditis, thyroid surgery, radiation
treatment: Levothyroxine (synthetic thyroid hormone)

name: Hyperthyroidism
causes: Graves' disease, thyroid nodules
treatment: Antithyroid drugs, radioiodine therapy, surgery

name: Hypertension
causes: Obesity, salt intake, stress, genetics, kidney disease
treatment: ACE inhibitors, beta blockers, lifestyle changes, low-sodium diet

name: Heart Attack (Myocardial Infarction)
causes: Coronary artery blockage, atherosclerosis
treatment: Emergency: aspirin, thrombolytics, angioplasty, bypass surgery

name: Stroke
causes: Blood clot or ruptured blood vessel in brain
treatment: Emergency: clot-busting drugs (tPA), thrombectomy, rehabilitation

name: Migraine
causes: Hormonal changes, stress, certain foods, sleep disruption
treatment: Triptans, pain relievers, anti-nausea drugs, preventive medications

name: Epilepsy
causes: Brain injury, genetics, stroke, brain tumor, infection
treatment: Anti-epileptic drugs, surgery, vagus nerve stimulation

name: Alzheimer's Disease
causes: Plaque buildup in brain, genetics, age
treatment: Cholinesterase inhibitors, memantine, behavioral therapy (no cure)

name: Parkinson's Disease
causes: Loss of dopamine-producing neurons, genetics
treatment: Levodopa, dopamine agonists, deep brain stimulation

name: Depression
causes: Chemical imbalance, trauma, genetics, chronic illness
treatment: Antidepressants (SSRIs), psychotherapy, CBT, lifestyle changes

name: Anxiety Disorder
causes: Stress, trauma, genetics, brain chemistry
treatment: CBT, SSRIs, benzodiazepines, relaxation techniques

name: Malaria
causes: Plasmodium parasite transmitted by Anopheles mosquito
treatment: Chloroquine, artemisinin-based therapy (ACT), supportive care

name: Dengue Fever
causes: Dengue virus transmitted by Aedes mosquito
treatment: Supportive care, fluids, pain relievers (avoid aspirin), hospitalization

name: Typhoid
causes: Salmonella typhi bacteria via contaminated food/water
treatment: Antibiotics (ciprofloxacin, azithromycin), fluids, hospitalization

name: Cholera
causes: Vibrio cholerae bacteria via contaminated water
treatment: Oral rehydration salts (ORS), IV fluids, antibiotics (doxycycline)

name: HIV/AIDS
causes: Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV)
treatment: Antiretroviral therapy (ART) - lifelong, preventive care

name: Hepatitis B
causes: Hepatitis B virus via blood, sexual contact, mother to child
treatment: Antiviral drugs (tenofovir, entecavir), vaccination for prevention

name: Hepatitis C
causes: Hepatitis C virus via blood contact
treatment: Direct-acting antivirals (DAAs) - 8-12 week cure

name: Liver Cirrhosis
causes: Chronic alcohol use, hepatitis, fatty liver disease
treatment: Treat underlying cause, diuretics, liver transplant in end stage

name: Gastroenteritis
causes: Norovirus, rotavirus, bacteria, contaminated food
treatment: ORS, rest, bland diet, probiotics, antibiotics if bacterial

name: Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS)
causes: Gut-brain interaction issue, stress, diet, gut bacteria
treatment: Diet changes (low FODMAP), fiber, antispasmodics, stress management

name: Appendicitis
causes: Blockage of appendix by stool or infection
treatment: Emergency surgery (appendectomy), antibiotics

name: Peptic Ulcer
causes: H. pylori bacteria, NSAIDs overuse, stress
treatment: Antibiotics for H. pylori, proton pump inhibitors (PPIs), antacids

name: Urinary Tract Infection (UTI)
causes: E. coli bacteria entering urinary tract
treatment: Antibiotics (trimethoprim, nitrofurantoin), fluids

name: Kidney Stones
causes: Calcium oxalate, uric acid buildup, dehydration
treatment: Pain relievers, fluids, alpha blockers, lithotripsy, surgery

name: Chronic Kidney Disease
causes: Diabetes, hypertension, glomerulonephritis
treatment: Control underlying disease, dialysis, kidney transplant

name: Anemia
causes: Iron deficiency, vitamin B12 deficiency, chronic disease, blood loss
treatment: Iron supplements, B12 injections, dietary changes, treat underlying cause

name: Leukemia
causes: Genetic mutations in blood cells
treatment: Chemotherapy, radiation, stem cell transplant, targeted therapy

name: Rheumatoid Arthritis
causes: Autoimmune attack on joint lining, genetics
treatment: DMARDs (methotrexate), biologics, NSAIDs, physical therapy

name: Lupus (SLE)
causes: Autoimmune condition, genetics, hormones, UV exposure
treatment: Hydroxychloroquine, steroids, immunosuppressants

name: Psoriasis
causes: Immune system dysfunction, genetics, triggers (stress, infection)
treatment: Topical treatments, phototherapy, biologics, methotrexate

name: Eczema (Atopic Dermatitis)
causes: Immune system overreaction, genetics, environmental triggers
treatment: Moisturizers, topical corticosteroids, antihistamines, immunomodulators

name: Chickenpox (Varicella)
causes: Varicella-zoster virus
treatment: Calamine lotion, antihistamines, antiviral (acyclovir) for severe cases

name: Conjunctivitis (Pink Eye)
causes: Bacteria, viruses, allergies
treatment: Antibiotic eye drops (bacterial), antihistamine drops (allergic), warm compress

name: Glaucoma
causes: Increased intraocular pressure damaging optic nerve
treatment: Eye drops to reduce pressure, laser therapy, surgery

name: Otitis Media (Ear Infection)
causes: Bacterial or viral infection of middle ear
treatment: Antibiotics (amoxicillin), pain relievers, warm compress

name: Osteoporosis
causes: Low bone density, menopause, vitamin D deficiency, aging
treatment: Calcium supplements, vitamin D, bisphosphonates, weight-bearing exercise

name: Gout
causes: High uric acid levels, purine-rich diet, genetics
treatment: NSAIDs, colchicine, allopurinol (long-term), low-purine diet

name: Breast Cancer
causes: Genetic mutations (BRCA1/2), hormones, age, family history
treatment: Surgery, chemotherapy, radiation, hormone therapy, targeted therapy

name: Lung Cancer
causes: Smoking, secondhand smoke, radon gas, asbestos
treatment: Surgery, chemotherapy, radiation, immunotherapy, targeted therapy

name: Cervical Cancer
causes: Human papillomavirus (HPV)
treatment: Surgery, radiation, chemotherapy, HPV vaccine for prevention

name: PCOS (Polycystic Ovary Syndrome)
causes: Hormonal imbalance, insulin resistance, genetics
treatment: Birth control pills, metformin, lifestyle changes, fertility treatment

name: Endometriosis
causes: Endometrial tissue growing outside uterus
treatment: Pain medication, hormonal therapy, laparoscopic surgery

name: Prostate Cancer
causes: Age, genetics, obesity, race
treatment: Surgery, radiation, hormone therapy, chemotherapy, active surveillance

name: Celiac Disease
causes: Immune reaction to gluten, genetics
treatment: Strict gluten-free diet (lifelong)

name: Multiple Sclerosis
causes: Immune system attacks myelin sheath of nerves
treatment: Disease-modifying therapies, steroids, physical therapy (no cure)

name: Scabies
causes: Sarcoptes scabiei mite infestation
treatment: Permethrin cream, ivermectin, treat all household contacts

name: Measles
causes: Measles virus (paramyxovirus)
treatment: Supportive care, vitamin A supplementation, MMR vaccine prevention

name: Zika Virus
causes: Zika virus via Aedes mosquito or sexual transmission
treatment: Supportive care only, rest and fluids (no specific treatment)

name: Rabies
causes: Rabies virus via bite of infected animal
treatment: Post-exposure prophylaxis (PEP), rabies vaccine - fatal if untreated

name: Tetanus
causes: Clostridium tetani bacteria via wound
treatment: Tetanus antitoxin, wound care, antibiotics, muscle relaxants

name: Viral Fever
causes: Various seasonal viruses
treatment: Rest, hydration, paracetamol for fever and body aches

name: Seasonal Allergies (Allergic Rhinitis)
causes: Pollen, dust mites, pet dander
treatment: Antihistamines, nasal sprays, avoiding triggers

name: Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease (GERD)
causes: Weak lower esophageal sphincter, hiatal hernia, obesity, smoking
treatment: Antacids, proton pump inhibitors (PPIs), dietary changes, weight loss

name: Strep Throat
causes: Streptococcus pyogenes bacteria
treatment: Antibiotics (penicillin, amoxicillin), rest, fluids, pain relievers

name: Sinusitis (Sinus Infection)
causes: Viral infection, bacterial infection, allergies, nasal polyps
treatment: Decongestants, saline nasal spray, pain relievers, antibiotics if bacterial

name: Mononucleosis
causes: Epstein-Barr virus (EBV)
treatment: Rest, fluids, OTC pain relievers (no specific medication)

name: Lyme Disease
causes: Borrelia burgdorferi bacteria transmitted by black-legged ticks
treatment: Antibiotics (doxycycline, amoxicillin) for 2-4 weeks

name: Shingles (Herpes Zoster)
symptoms: painful rash on one side of body
causes: Reactivation of the varicella-zoster virus (chickenpox)
treatment: Antiviral drugs (acyclovir), pain relief, Shingrix vaccine for prevention

name: Osteoarthritis
causes: Wear and tear of joint cartilage, age, joint injury, obesity
treatment: Physical therapy, NSAIDs, joint injections, joint replacement surgery

name: Fibromyalgia
causes: Unknown; likely central nervous system pain processing issue
treatment: Pain relievers, antidepressants, anti-seizure drugs, physical therapy

name: Ringworm
causes: Dermatophyte fungi
treatment: Antifungal creams, oral antifungals for severe cases

name: Athlete's Foot
causes: Dermatophyte fungi thriving in warm, moist environments
treatment: OTC antifungal creams, keeping feet dry and clean

name: Acne Vulgaris
symptoms: large solid painful lumps beneath skin
causes: Excess oil production, clogged hair follicles, bacteria, hormones
treatment: Topical retinoids, salicylic acid, benzoyl peroxide, oral antibiotics, isotretinoin

name: Rosacea
causes: Unknown; combinations of genetics and environmental factors
treatment: Topical treatments, oral antibiotics, laser therapy, identifying triggers

name: Hives (Urticaria)
causes: Allergic reactions to food, medication, or environment, stress, infections
treatment: Antihistamines, corticosteroids for severe cases, avoiding triggers

name: Cellulitis
causes: Bacteria (streptococcus or staphylococcus) entering through a break in skin
treatment: Oral or IV antibiotics, elevating affected area

name: Crohn's Disease
causes: Immune system reacting to normal gut bacteria, genetics
treatment: Anti-inflammatory drugs, immune system suppressors, biologics, surgery

name: Ulcerative Colitis
causes: Abnormal immune response in the colon, genetics
treatment: Anti-inflammatory drugs, biologics, surgery to remove colon

name: Gallstones
symptoms: sudden pain in upper right abdomen
causes: Excess cholesterol or bilirubin in bile, poor gallbladder emptying
treatment: Surgery to remove gallbladder (cholecystectomy), medications to dissolve stones

name: Hemorrhoids
causes: Straining during bowel movements, chronic constipation, pregnancy, obesity
treatment: High-fiber diet, topical treatments, warm baths, rubber band ligation, surgery

name: Sleep Apnea
symptoms: episodes of stopped breathing during sleep
causes: Relaxation of throat muscles blocking airway, obesity, large tonsils
treatment: CPAP machine, weight loss, oral appliances, surgery

name: Bipolar Disorder
causes: Genetics, altered brain structure and chemistry, extreme stress
treatment: Mood stabilizers (Lithium), antipsychotics, psychotherapy

name: Schizophrenia
causes: Genetics, brain chemistry (dopamine/glutamate), environment
treatment: Antipsychotic medications, cognitive behavioral therapy, supported employment

name: ADHD (Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder)
causes: Genetics, brain development differences, premature birth
treatment: Stimulant medications, behavioral therapy, organizational skills training

name: Restless Legs Syndrome
causes: Dopamine imbalance, iron deficiency, kidney failure, genetics
treatment: Iron supplements, dopamine agonists, anti-seizure drugs, exercise

name: Bell's Palsy
symptoms: sudden weakness on one side of face
pain around the jaw or behind ear
causes: Viral infection causing swelling of the facial nerve
treatment: Corticosteroids, antiviral drugs, physical therapy, eye drops

name: Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT)
symptoms: red or discolored skin on leg
feeling of warmth in affected leg
causes: Prolonged immobility, surgery, blood clotting disorders, obesity
treatment: Blood thinners (anticoagulants), compression stockings, clot busters

name: Arrhythmia
causes: Heart disease, electrolyte imbalance, genetics, stress, caffeine
treatment: Antiarrhythmic drugs, pacemakers, catheter ablation, cardioversion

name: Heart Failure
symptoms: shortness of breath with activity or lying down
swelling in legs, ankles, and feet
causes: Coronary artery disease, hypertension, faulty heart valves
treatment: ACE inhibitors, beta blockers, diuretics, lifestyle changes, surgery

name: Sickle Cell Anemia
causes: Inherited genetic mutation affecting hemoglobin
treatment: Pain medications, hydroxyurea, blood transfusions, bone marrow transplant

name: Pertussis (Whooping Cough)
symptoms: high-pitched whoop sound when breathing in
causes: Bordetella pertussis bacteria
treatment: Antibiotics, supportive care, preventable via DTaP vaccine

name: Rubella (German Measles)
symptoms: fine pink rash starting on face
causes: Rubella virus
treatment: Supportive care, rest, fever reducers, preventable via MMR vaccine

name: Mumps
causes: Mumps virus
treatment: Rest, pain relievers, cold/warm compresses, preventable via MMR vaccine

name: Cataracts
symptoms: increasing difficulty with vision at night
need for brighter light for reading
causes: Aging, diabetes, smoking, excessive sunlight exposure
treatment: Prescription glasses, cataract removal surgery

name: Macular Degeneration
symptoms: need for brighter light when reading
increased difficulty adapting to low light levels
causes: Aging, genetics, smoking, obesity, cardiovascular disease
treatment: Vitamins, anti-VEGF injections, laser therapy, low vision aids

name: Meniere's Disease
causes: Abnormal fluid buildup in the inner ear
treatment: Motion sickness medications, anti-nausea medications, low-salt diet, hearing aids

name: Plantar Fasciitis
symptoms: pain after long periods of standing
causes: Tension and stress on the plantar fascia, obesity, improper footwear
treatment: Physical therapy, night splints, orthotics, steroid injections, rest

name: Tendonitis
causes: Repetitive motion, sudden injury, age
treatment: Rest, physical therapy, pain relievers, corticosteroid injections

name: Bursitis
symptoms: pain worsening with movement or pressure
causes: Repetitive motion, injury, underlying inflammatory conditions (like gout)
treatment: Rest, ice, pain relievers, physical therapy, joint injections

name: Sjogren's Syndrome
causes: Autoimmune disorder often accompanying rheumatoid arthritis or lupus
treatment: Artificial tears, saliva substitutes, immunosuppressants, NSAIDs

name: COPD (Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease)
causes: Smoking, long-term exposure to lung irritants, genetics
treatment: Bronchodilators, inhaled steroids, oxygen therapy, pulmonary rehabilitation

name: Gastroenteritis (Stomach Flu)
causes: Norovirus, rotavirus, contaminated food or water
treatment: Hydration, rest, bland diet, avoiding dairy and caffeine
